## Reviewer objective

Independently replay the ASCENSION-001 Evidence Docket and verify whether the local/proxy claim is supported.

## Review checklist

- [ ] Clean checkout or fork used
- [ ] ASCENSION-001 Independent Replay workflow completed
- [ ] Evidence Docket artifact downloaded
- [ ] `00_manifest.json` inspected
- [ ] Root hash inspected
- [ ] B0-B7 baseline ladder inspected
- [ ] B6 vs B5 comparison inspected
- [ ] Held-out transfer task inspected
- [ ] RSI state hashes inspected
- [ ] Drift sentinel inspected
- [ ] ECI ledger inspected
- [ ] Move-37 dossier gate inspected
- [ ] Safety ledger inspected
- [ ] Cost ledger inspected
- [ ] Falsification audit inspected
- [ ] Claim boundary inspected

## Verdict

Choose one:

- [ ] Replay confirmed
- [ ] Replay partially confirmed
- [ ] Replay failed
- [ ] Needs more evidence

## Notes

_Add reviewer notes here._

## Claim boundary

This review does not certify AGI, ASI, empirical SOTA, safe autonomy, real-world certification, guaranteed economic return, or civilization-scale capability.
